description: discover signals + render + marker-check a draft governance skill card for an existing skill (read-only)
rules: read-only on the target skill: credential files are skipped and secret-like values redacted
never mutates the source skill; outputs (discovery report, context, rendered card) go to record_store
the rendered card is a DRAFT — a human owner must review it; the tool never signs, publishes, or approves
render is deterministic: identical context JSON always yields an identical card
usage: Set SKILL_DIR (absolute path to the target agent-skill directory containing SKILL.md/skill.md). Step 1 (discover_assets) writes discovery.txt; the agent then authors a context JSON, render_card.py renders the card, and validate_submission.py greps for leftover VERIFY/SELECT markers. Output of the entry step: discovery.txt.
limitation: The generated card is a draft and must be reviewed by a human owner. Discovery is limited to local files and repo metadata visible from the target path. The renderer validates required context SHAPE, not the legal or safety correctness of field values. Canned limitation/risk catalogs are starting points; prune entries that do not apply. render_card.py requires jinja2.
